leaderboard.title: Top Holders

leaderboard.active_soon: Most active accounts is coming soon.
leaderboard.active_soon_hint: Endpoint /accounts/top?sort=tx_count pending on the Sentrix Chain API.

tokens.title: Tokens
tokens.empty_hint: The token indexer is still backfilling — the chain has deployed tokens (e.g. CBLAST on the CoinBlast launchpad at coinblast.sentriscloud.com) but they're not in this list yet. Visit /contracts for the canonical infrastructure contracts (WSRX, Multicall3, SentrixSafe, TokenFactory, etc.).

token_detail.transfers_soon: Transfer history is not yet available.
token_detail.holders_soon: Top holders list is not yet available.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We hit an unexpected error loading this page. Try again, or go back to the home page.

not_found_page.title: We couldn't find that page.
not_found_page.description: The route doesn't exist on this explorer, or the address / hash you typed is incomplete. The search bar above accepts block heights, 64-char tx hashes, and 0x addresses.
